overview: Campus Lost & Found is a mobile-first web app that helps students and staff report, search, and recover lost items on campus. Users can post lost or found items with images and location, browse and filter listings, send claim requests, get smart match suggestions, and manage everything from a clean card-based interface.
features: Report lost and found items with image upload
Search and filter listings by category, date, and location
Item detail pages with claim request flow
In-app notifications for claims and matches
User profile with item tracking and status management
Mobile-first responsive design with soft blue/green palette
